creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: makc
Date: Fri Sep 21 22:23:22 2012
New Revision: 304642
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304642

Log:
  Add new port audio/lxmusic:
  
  LXDE music player based on xmms2
  
  PR:		ports/171651
  Submitted by:	Eric Turgeon <ericturgeon.bsd at gmail.com>

Added:
  head/audio/lxmusic/
  head/audio/lxmusic/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/lxmusic/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/lxmusic/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/lxmusic/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/audio/Makefile

Modified: head/audio/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/Makefile	Fri Sep 21 21:31:02 2012	(r304641)
+++ head/audio/Makefile	Fri Sep 21 22:23:22 2012	(r304642)
@@ -434,6 +434,7 @@
     SUBDIR += lpac
     SUBDIR += lplayer
     SUBDIR += lv2core
+    SUBDIR += lxmusic
     SUBDIR += mac
     SUBDIR += mad
     SUBDIR += madfufw

Added: head/audio/lxmusic/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/lxmusic/Makefile	Fri Sep 21 22:23:22 2012	(r304642)
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	lxmusic
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.5
+CATEGORIES=	audio
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/ghostbsdproject/package/LXMusic/
+
+MAINTAINER=	ericturgeon@ghostbsd.org
+COMMENT=	LXDE music player based on xmms2
+
+LIB_DEPENDS=	xmmsclient:${PORTSDIR}/audio/xmms2 \
+		notify:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libnotify
+
+USE_GNOME=	gtk20
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
+GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+USE_GETTEXT=	yes
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
+CPPFLAGS+=	-I${LOCALBASE}/include ${PTHREAD_CFLAGS}
+LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib ${PTHREAD_LIBS}
+
+post-install:
+	@-${LOCALBASE}/bin/update-desktop-database > /dev/null
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/audio/lxmusic/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/lxmusic/distinfo	Fri Sep 21 22:23:22 2012	(r304642)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (lxmusic-0.4.5.tar.gz) = b9527495da616d811707c3084c0fcfe241bf74563dcffef22b1dd37a23fc5ff8
+SIZE (lxmusic-0.4.5.tar.gz) = 291221

Added: head/audio/lxmusic/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/lxmusic/pkg-descr	Fri Sep 21 22:23:22 2012	(r304642)
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+LXMusic is the minimalist music player for LXDE. This is based on
+xmms2, which is lightweight and has server/client design. LXMusic
+has very few features, it can do nothing more than just playing a
+list of music files.
+
+WWW: http://wiki.lxde.org/en/LXMusic
